title: Logs to Sticks
description: This datapack lets you turn logs directly into sticks, skipping the usual step of crafting planks. It speeds up resource processing and makes crafting more efficient.
body: Logs to Sticks is a Minecraft datapack that lets you craft logs directly into sticks, skipping the usual step of turning logs into planks. The pack uses the Minecraft log tag, so it works with both Vanilla and modded wood, allowing for seamless crafting with any properly tagged logs. This improves crafting efficiency and saves time while maintaining full compatibility with other mods and gameplay mechanics.
